It does not perform any data processing, network requests beyond connection setup, or contain any malicious logic.\n- No signs of obfuscation, backdoors, or malicious payloads are present.\n- The security risk is minimal; the only potential concern is if the contract address supplied is malicious, but the code itself is safe.\n\n### **My estimated scores:**\n- **Malware:** 0\n- **Obfuscated:** 0\n- **Risk:** 0.1\n\n**Summary:** The code is safe, standard, and free from malicious or obfuscated elements.
